events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: structural welding done without qualified WPS parameters, inspected/tested stage. AWS D1.1 requires WPS qualified per Clause 5 (WPS). Welding without qualified WPS is non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high/critical. Component condition: non-compliant, possibly installed-defective. Work stage tested/inspected. Percent complete maybe 90. Value 0. Confidence high. Findings and actions.

  ],
  "rationale": "AWS D1.1 requires welding to be performed using a qualified or prequalified WPS. Welding without qualified WPS parameters is non-compliant, and since the work has already passed through inspection, the welds are installed-defective and cannot be accepted.",
